questions.question_text: CO Mapping Business cannot survive without proactive operations management. Discuss 1 How does operation strategy support manufacturing sector? 1 How corporate, business and operation strategies are linked? 2 Discuss concept of scheduling in services. 2 Discuss various flow involved in a supply chain and their importance. 3 Discuss various costs associated with inventory. 3 Explain Deming’s PDCA Model. 4 Discuss 5Cs of TQM. 4 CO Mapping
What do you understand by operations management? Discuss various critical decisions taken by operation manager. 1
Discuss role of operation strategies in smooth running of a business enterprise. 1 CO Mapping
What is Business Process Modelling? Compare and contrast physical and logical databases. Discuss the importance of relational databases in business process management. 2
“Scheduling is a short-term planning tool.” What is difference between loading and sequencing? 2 CO Mapping
Explain the phenomenon of Bullwhip Effect in supply chain management. What are the critical decision-making areas in supply chain? 3

Factory uses annually 24000 units of raw material which Costs Rs 1.25 per unit. Ordering cost is Rs 25 per order and carrying cost is 6% per year of unit price. Find EOQ and total inventory cost including cost of material. The factory works for 320 days a year. If the procurement time is 10 days find ROL, the maximum and average inventories. 3 CO Mapping
What is quality? How good or bad quality affects operations of a business? Discuss various costs associated with quality with suitable examples 4
Write a short note on Total Productive Maintenance. 4
